titleStmt.title: SII 18.71: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 71. (B.K. No. 113 of 1933-34.) MŌṬĒBENNŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 988, Parābhava, Pushya s11u. Paṅchami, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1066, December 24, Sunday.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Lakshmarasa was governing Banavāse Twelve-thousand, his subordinate Āychaṇa built a Jaina shrine and installed therein the image of Śānthinātha-Jina, at Peḷeyagēri (a locality) of Beṇṇevura. Then, after introducing Gōyimmarasa of Chikkamba family and the nārgāvuṇda of Sattaḷige Seventy and his subordinates Ālagāvuṇḍa and others, it records a grant of land made by Lakshmarasa to the basadi built by Āychimayya-nāyaka (same as Āychaṇa above). The gift was entrusted to Śāntiṇandi-Bhaṭṭāraka of Chandrikāvāṭavaṁśa. His spiritual lineage is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . © © © ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī matraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhipravardha mānamācandrārkkatāraṁ salutta
mire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranudāramahēśvaraṁ calakke balgaṇḍaṁ śau
ryamārttaṇḍaṁ patigēka[dāḍaṁ ?] saṁgrāmagaruḍaṁ manujamāndhātaṁ kīrttivikhyātaṁ gōtramāṇikyaṁ vivēkacāṇakyaṁ para
nārīsahōdaraṁ vīravṛkōdaraṁ kōdaṇḍapārtthaṁ saujanyatīrtthaṁ maṇḍaḷika kaṇṭhīravaṁ paracakrabhairavaṁ rāyagaṇḍagō
pāḷaṁ malevamaṇḍaḷikamṛgaśārddūḷaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ lakṣmarasarbba
navāse panircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadi nāḷdarasugeyyuttamire . caturara
māramaṇaṁ jitaripuvarggaṁ calakke balgaṇḍaṁ vistṛtacaḷukirājyanurvvīpatige dharātaḷa maneyde bāykēḷisidaṁ . vidi
śāstraṁ ripurāyamaṇḍaḷikasēnābhaṁjanaṁ vairinīradadurvvārasamīraṇaṁ vitaraṇaṁ krīḍāvinōdaṁ pratāpadiḷīpaṁ ripupuṁ
jakaṁjavanakēḷīkuṁjaraṁ laṁjikāmadanāstraṁ caladaṁkarāma nṛpalakṣmīlakṣmaṇaṁ lakṣmaṇaṁ . Anavaratadāni lakṣmana manu
caritana paravadhūsahōdarana jagajjanavaṁdyakāmadhēnuva vinatāriya nikhiḷapādapadā rādhyar . prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśa
ktitrayaguṇaviditaṁ rājimayyaṁ mahāmātyabharaṁ sadvācanālēkhanagaṇanaguṇastutya nintāycimayyaṁ vibhu sau
janyāṁkuraṁ paṇḍitakuvaḷayasaṁrāja gōvindarājaṁ vibhavāttaṁ dhōrapāryyaṁ sujanajanamanōraṁjanarddharmmanarmmar . Iva
ranubhavaṇeya kāladoḷavanīśaṁ lakṣmabhūpanājñeyinī beṇnevurada peḷeyagēriyoḷavitatha jinagṛhamanaycaṇaṁ mā
ḍisidaṁ . māḍisi tajjinēṁdragṛhamaṁ tadanu trijagadvinūtamaṁ rūḍhi śāntināthajinabiṁba manoppire tatpratiṣṭhe
yaṁ māḍi himādri dikkari payōdhiyoḷnijakīrttivalli vikrīḍise bhavyahṛtkamaḷabhāskara naycaṇanēṁ kṛtārttha
nō . munirājāmararāja nāga nararājōnmauḷisaṁsēvyapādanaghārāti jinēṁdra nāptanapahṁsālakṣaṇaṁ dha
rmmamudghaniyāmarnnayaṇandipaṇḍitamunīṁdrarvvādivāgmīśaranyanayāstargguru gaḷnisarggamenalindaycaṇnanēndha
nyano © svasti samastadustarārātimastakasthaḷadōrdṇaṇḍaṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaṁ dhanurvvidyā pārtthaṁ parigrahatīrtthaṁ cikkaṁba kuḷānvayaṁ
śrīpraṇamēśvaradēvapādapaṁkajabhramara nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadgōyimma rasaṁ sattaḷigeyeḷpa
ttarkke nārggāvuṇḍugeyye tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷ . salliya rālagāvuṇḍaṁ mukkaṭa rēkagāvuṇḍaṁ teneyara kundagā
vuṇḍaṁ mallagāvuṇḍaṁ bādiga dēvagāvuṇḍaṁ sōvagāvuṇḍaṁ koṇḍasa barmmagāvuṇḍa Ālugara barmmagāvuṇḍaṁ salliyara
jjagāvuṇḍaṁ peḷeyara cāvagāvuṇḍaṁ kaliyamagāvuṇḍaṁ naṭṭiya barmmagāvuṇḍanantu beṇnevurada pannirvvarggāvu
ṇḍugeyye . dēvagurubhaktanakhiḷōrvvīvinuta jinēṁdramandirāvāsamumaṁ bhūmiyumanosedu koṭṭaṁ cāvaṁ peḷe
yakuḷābjavanamārttaṇḍaṁ . śrīmūḷasaṁghavārāśau maṇīnāmiva sārcciṣāṁ mahā puruṣaratnānāṁ sthānaṁ dēsigaṇa
yōjani . Ajani jagadudagrassūktisinduprasūtērjjinasamayamahādrēścaṁdri kāvāṭavaṁśaḥ suruciracaritāThis seems to be a mistake for dēsigaṇōjani. CF. Ep. Ind., vol. XVI, p. 55.
yadguṇaśrēṇimuktāmaṇivitatimayōbhūdadbhutaṁ karṇnapūraḥ . Antu negaṟevettanva yadoḷ . cāndraṁ kātaṁtra
jainēṁdraṁ śabdānuśāsanaṁ pāṇini mattaiṁdra narēṁdraṇandimunīṁdraṁgēkākṣaraṁ peṟaṁgivu moggē . tacchiṣyarkkanakaṇandibhaṭṭāra
kar . tadanujarnnayaṇandipaṇḍitadēvar . tadantēvāsigaḷsiddhaṇandipaṇḍitadēvar . tatsahōdarar . Apagatamada
mātsaryyarkkṛpāpararbhbhavyasēvyaramaḷacaritrarkkupitabahubandhagaḷitarnnṛpapūjyarnne gaḻda śāntiṇandimunīndrar ©
sakavarṣaṁ 988 neya parābhava saṁvatsarada puṣya sudha paṁcami Ādityavāramutta rāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyandu śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ lakṣmarasar Aycimayyanāyakana basadige śāntiṇandibhaṭṭārakara pādōdakammāḍi sarvvana
maśyamāge Ūriṁ paḍuva mallavurada baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga kacchaviya gaḍiṁbadalkoṭṭa mattar mūṟu keṟeya ke
yyiṁ baḍaga Ekala keḷage mattar Āṟu Ekaliṁ mūḍaṇa gaṟde kamma Irppattu basa
diya nivēsaṇakke mēre Īśānyakamāgnēyakkaṁ kuṁdagā dhanalnaṭṭakariya
vāyavyakke Ūrggōḍe . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā bhūmistasya tasya
tadā phaḷaṁ . Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge vāraṇā maṁ paṁcara
tnadoḷkaṭṭisi sāsirvvabrāhmaṇarggubha
pātakanukkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō jā
yatē kṛmiḥ . dēvaṇandibhaṭṭārakara gu bammōjana besaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 18.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
